summary: Designs, develops and maintains AI Agents using firm's AI agent platform and orchestration tools, integrating with internal and external applications via APIs to support agent workflows and process automation; builds and supports process automations using Power Automate, Zapier and Workato to streamline routine tasks and cross-system activities; collaborates with stakeholders to gather requirements, define outcomes and iteratively improve solutions.
